meta.description: Histories Card for Admin Report Detail View

props.className: bg-white dark:bg-gray-800 border border-gray-200 dark:border-gray-700 rounded-lg p-6

cellChildren.name: Span

props.className: inline-flex items-center px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-xs font-medium {{row.type === 'reported' ? 'bg-blue-100 text-blue-800 dark:bg-blue-600 dark:text-white' : row.type === 're_reported' ? 'bg-indigo-100 text-indigo-800 dark:bg-indigo-600 dark:text-white' : row.type === 'rejected' ? 'bg-purple-100 text-purple-800 dark:bg-purple-600 dark:text-white' : row.type === 'suspended' ? 'bg-orange-100 text-orange-800 dark:bg-orange-600 dark:text-white' : row.type === 'deleted' ? 'bg-gray-600 text-white dark:bg-gray-500 dark:text-white' : row.type === 'restored' ? 'bg-green-100 text-green-800 dark:bg-green-600 dark:text-white' : row.type === 'review' ? 'bg-cyan-100 text-cyan-800 dark:bg-cyan-600 dark:text-white' : 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-800 dark:bg-gray-600 dark:text-gray-100'}}

cellChildren.text: {{row.type === 'reported' ? '$t:sirsoft-board.admin.reports.detail.history_timeline.reported' : row.type === 're_reported' ? '$t:sirsoft-board.admin.reports.detail.history_timeline.re_reported' : row.type === 'rejected' ? '$t:sirsoft-board.admin.reports.detail.history_timeline.rejected' : row.type === 'suspended' ? '$t:sirsoft-board.admin.reports.detail.history_timeline.suspended' : row.type === 'deleted' ? '$t:sirsoft-board.admin.reports.detail.history_timeline.deleted' : row.type === 'restored' ? '$t:sirsoft-board.admin.reports.detail.history_timeline.restored' : row.type === 'review' ? '$t:sirsoft-board.admin.reports.detail.history_timeline.review' : row.action_label ?? row.type}}

props.className: text-xs text-gray-600 dark:text-gray-400 leading-relaxed whitespace-pre-line break-words max-w-md
